title: Patna, Bihar — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Patna, Bihar: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Patna is a city in Bihar with a population of 2,500,000. The capital of Bihar, one of the world’s oldest continuously inhabited cities, with a rich history spanning over two millennia.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
